archive_title: A Python Library for the Theoretical-Numerical Search and Localization of Hidden Attractors
ci_status_scope: Python 3.11/3.12/3.13 on macOS, Ubuntu, and Windows
ci_status_note: Recorded after the release cleanup CI matrix passed. Final scientific freeze audit remains separate from CI status.
freeze_audit_note: Final scientific freeze audit passed under validation/freeze_audit/final_freeze_pytest_summary.json; its recorded scientific audit commit remains last_recorded_freeze_audit_commit, while package metadata tracks the current repository HEAD.

paper_policy: Any local writing and manuscript templates are prepared locally and ignored by Git. They are not part of the software repository readiness contract.
excluded_paths: DF y NC Chua entero y fraccionario/
DF y NC Chua entero y fraccionario copy/
arctan_status: chua_fractional_arctan promoted as hiddenness_supported_under_tested_neighborhoods for local radii <= 0.3 with 8400 finite probes and zero contacts across E0, E+, and E-; macro radii 1.0 and 2.0 remain extended audit evidence with contacts and are outside the local claim boundary. Wu2023 remains a separate bibliographic ADM lane.
claims_status: finite-time numerical evidence under recorded validation contracts
public_cli_scope_note: Machado/FDF seed routes are theory/internal planned support only and are not exposed as public release CLI commands.

pypi_readiness.wheel_smoke_notes: Validated 2026-06-26 with Python 3.14 venv; fixed lazy import for danca_abm_sphere_controls in cli/published.py and try/except fallback in danca_abm_sphere_controls.py; removed duplicate argparse args in strict_target_refinement.py make_parser()
